vastu.title: Vastu & Muhurat
vastu.heroBody: A friendly guide to plot facing, numerology and auspicious timing — traditions that matter to many families when choosing land and homes.
vastu.numNeedDigit: Add at least one digit to calculate the Mulank.
vastu.disclaimer: Shared as cultural guidance only. Please consult a qualified Vastu expert or family priest for important decisions — JAMIN Properties makes no religious or financial guarantee.

north_east.name: North-East (Ishanya)
north_east.note: The most auspicious corner. Ideal for the main entrance, pooja room and water source. Keep it open, clean and light.

north.name: North (Kubera)
north.note: Governs wealth and career growth. A north-facing plot or entrance is highly sought after.

east.name: East (Surya)
east.note: Brings health, vitality and prosperity. East-facing entrances catch the morning sun — very favourable.

west.name: West (Varuna)
west.note: Balanced and stable. Good for those later in their career; suitable with the right internal layout.

south_east.name: South-East (Agni)
south_east.note: The fire corner — best for the kitchen. Avoid placing the main entrance or water tank here.

north_west.name: North-West (Vayu)
north_west.note: Movement and relationships. Good for guest rooms and stores; keep it lighter than the south-west.

south.name: South (Yama)
south.note: Needs careful planning. Keep this side heavier/taller and avoid large openings for balance.

south_west.name: South-West (Nairutya)
south_west.note: Should be the heaviest, highest zone — ideal for the master bedroom. Avoid the main entrance or slopes here.

1.vibe: Leadership, independence and a strong new beginning.

2.vibe: Harmony, family bonding and emotional comfort.

3.vibe: Growth, wisdom and prosperity — considered very lucky.

4.vibe: Stability through effort; plan finances carefully.

5.vibe: Business, communication and quick fortune — highly favourable.

6.vibe: Luxury, love and domestic bliss — excellent for family homes.

7.vibe: Peace and spirituality; steady rather than flashy gains.

8.vibe: Rewards after patience and discipline; mixed but powerful.

9.vibe: Energy, courage and drive — a strong, action-oriented number.

muhuratTips: Griha Pravesh (house-warming) is traditionally done in the months of Magha, Phalguna, Vaishakha and Jyeshtha.
Favoured weekdays are Monday, Wednesday, Thursday and Friday; many avoid Tuesday and Saturday.
Uttarayana (Jan–Jul, the sun's northward journey) is preferred over Dakshinayana for new beginnings.
Avoid the Adhik Maas (extra lunar month), eclipses and the Pitru Paksha fortnight for registrations.
